title: Cultivator with improved air circulation
abstract: The present invention relates to a cultivator (1) comprising: â a cabinet (2) delimiting a chamber (3), having a door to allow accessing the chamber (3) and having at least one aperture (4) for allowing air exchange between the chamber (3) and the external ambient; â at least one shelf (5) mounted on the cabinet (2) inside the chamber (3); and â at least one cultivating unit (7) aimed to be placed on the shelf (5) and comprising an operational area (8) for supporting the soil whereon the plants are grown.
claims: Claims A cultivator (1) comprising: â¢ a cabinet (2) delimiting a chamber (3), having a door to allow accessing the chamber (3) and having at least one aperture (4) for allowing air exchange between the chamber (3) and the external ambient; â¢ at least one shelf (5) mounted on the cabinet (2) inside the chamber (3); â¢ at least one cultivating unit (7) aimed to be placed on the shelf (5) and comprising an operational area (8) for supporting the soil whereon the plants are grown, characterized in that the cultivating unit (7) further comprises a spacing element (9) aimed to separate the operational area (8) from the cabinet (2) and provided with at least one through hole (10) for allowing air passing through the cultivating unit (7). 2. The cultivator (1) according to claim 1, characterized in that the spacing element (9) is frontally provided on the cultivating unit (7) and it is aimed to separate the operational area (8) from the door of the cabinet (2). 3. The cultivator (1) according to any of the claim 1 or 2, characterized that the spacing element (9) functions as a handle. 4. The cultivator (1) according to claim 3, characterized in that the spacing element (9) extends substantially for all the width of the cultivating unit (7). 5. The cultivator (1) according to claim 4, characterized in that the through hole (10) is a slit extending substantially along the whole width of the spacing element (9). 6. The cultivator (1) according to any of the claims 3 to 5, characterized in that the spacing element (9) has an L shape defining a recess (11) wherein the fingers of a user can be inserted in order to grasp the cultivating unit (7). 7. The cultivator (1) according to any of the previous claims, characterized in that the cultivating unit (7) comprises a support body (12), a mounting body (13) connected to the support body (12) for mounting the cultivating unit (7) on the shelf (5) and a tray (14) placeable on the support body (12) and comprising the operational area (8) whereon the soil for growing the plants is to be placed. 8. The cultivator (1) according to claim 7, characterized in that the support body (12) has a concave shape and it is aimed to receive water for watering the plants. 9. The cultivator (1) according to claim 7 or 8, characterized in that the tray (14) comprises the spacing element (9). 10. The cultivator (1) according to any one of the previous claims, characterized in that the cultivating unit (7) further comprises a frontal covering panel (15) aimed to frontally cover the shelf (5) when the cultivating unit (7) is placed on it. 11. The cultivator (1) according to claim 7 and 10, characterized in that the covering panel (15) is connected to the mounting body (13) of the cultivating unit (7).
